scenarios.title: Molecular ML, Drug Discovery, and Chemistry Workflows
scenarios.when_to_read: Cheminformatics, molecule processing, molecular property prediction, featurization, molecule generation, retrosynthesis, and chemistry model training tasks.
scenarios.role: TorchDrug provides PyTorch graph-learning workflows for molecular property prediction, molecular pretraining, generation, retrosynthesis, and chemistry datasets.
scenarios.read_when: Tasks mention TorchDrug, TorchProtein, SMILES, RDKit molecule graphs, ClinTox, BACE, Tox21, ZINC250k, USPTO50k, GIN/RGCN molecular models, GCPN, GraphAF, G2Gs, retrosynthesis, scaffold splits, molecule property prediction, molecule generation, or drug-discovery graph neural networks.
scenarios.best_for: Building or debugging TorchDrug molecular datasets, feature choices, graph neural model/task pairs, Engine wiring, molecular generation planning, and retrosynthesis pipelines.
scenarios.avoid_when: Use RDKit/Datamol-specific skills for standalone cheminformatics operations, simulation skills for molecular dynamics, or generic PyTorch skills when no TorchDrug data/model/task APIs are involved.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose torchdrug when the request needs TorchDrug's graph data containers, built-in drug-discovery datasets, molecular task classes, or core.Engine training flow rather than only generic chemistry parsing.

scenarios.title: Graph Learning Workflows
scenarios.when_to_read: Graph neural network tasks, graph construction, message passing, graph datasets, graph data loaders, sparse graph operations, and graph model troubleshooting.
scenarios.role: TorchDrug provides tensor-backed graph, molecule, protein, and knowledge-graph containers plus graph neural layers and models for graph ML workflows.
scenarios.read_when: Tasks mention graph neural networks, message passing, PackedGraph, PackedMolecule, PackedProtein, GraphConv, GIN, RGCN, GAT, MPNN, SchNet, GearNet, GraphConstruction, variadic tensors, graph_collate, graph masking, graph packing, or TorchDrug model customization.
scenarios.best_for: TorchDrug-specific graph object construction, batching/masking, layer/model selection, custom MessagePassingBase implementations, and training graph models with core.Engine.
scenarios.avoid_when: Use PyG or DGL skills when the user is using torch-geometric or DGL APIs directly and does not need TorchDrug containers or task classes.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose torchdrug for graph ML requests with TorchDrug API names, drug/protein/KG task classes, or tensor-backed PackedGraph workflows; choose another graph package skill only when the API surface is not TorchDrug.

scenarios.title: Protein Structure Prediction and Design Workflows
scenarios.when_to_read: Protein language models, protein embeddings, protein structure or sequence workflows, contact prediction, function/property prediction, and protein model troubleshooting.
scenarios.role: TorchDrug/TorchProtein covers protein sequence and structure data, GearNet/ESM/protein encoders, contact prediction, protein property/function tasks, and PPI workflows.
scenarios.read_when: Tasks mention TorchProtein, ProteinNet, AlphaFoldDB, EnzymeCommission, Fluorescence, Stability, BetaLactamase, protein contact prediction, GearNet, ESM, ProteinCNN, ProteinResNet, ProteinLSTM, ProteinBERT, PackedProtein, residue features, graph construction for proteins, or protein-protein interaction prediction.
scenarios.best_for: Planning TorchDrug protein datasets, feature choices, model/task pairings, ESM/GearNet caveats, ContactPrediction settings, and Engine-based protein training loops.
scenarios.avoid_when: Use AlphaFold/ColabFold/Boltz/ProteinMPNN/RFdiffusion skills for structure prediction or design systems that do not use TorchDrug/TorchProtein APIs.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose torchdrug for protein tasks framed around TorchDrug/TorchProtein datasets, encoders, tasks, or Engine; choose dedicated protein-structure skills for non-TorchDrug prediction/design pipelines.

scenarios.title: Deep Learning Training Engines
scenarios.when_to_read: Engine-level utilities, training loops, config systems, logging, visualization, checkpointing, and debugging for deep learning frameworks.
scenarios.role: TorchDrug's core.Engine and Configurable/Registry stack provide package-specific model/task training, evaluation, checkpoint, and config serialization workflows.
scenarios.read_when: Tasks mention torchdrug.core.Engine, Configurable, Registry, task.predict, task.target, solver.train, solver.evaluate, solver.save, solver.load, config_dict, load_config_dict, gpus, logger='wandb', gradient_interval, or TorchDrug checkpoint loading.
scenarios.best_for: TorchDrug-specific training harness assembly, Task contract debugging, checkpoint/config round-trips, CPU/GPU selection, and safe no-dataset smoke checks.
scenarios.avoid_when: Use generic PyTorch, Lightning, Accelerate, or distributed-training skills when the training loop is not using TorchDrug's Engine and task abstractions.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose torchdrug when the training engine question names TorchDrug abstractions or combines graph drug-discovery tasks with core.Engine; otherwise choose the framework owning the active training loop.
